name.text: Calculating the total mass of maize the silo in tonnes

questiontext.text:
Agricultural Storage: The Grain Silo

A farmer uses a steel silo to store maize. The silo consists of a cylindrical main body and a conical hopper at the bottom to allow the grain to flow out easily. The dimensions are:

  • Internal diameter of the silo = {@diam@} m
  • Height of the cylindrical part = {@h_cyl@} m
  • Vertical depth of the conical hopper = {@h_cone@} m
[[jsxgraph width="400px" height="500px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, { boundingbox: [-10, 18, 10, -12], axis: false, showCopyright: false }); var R = {#r#}; var H_cyl = {#h_cyl#}; var H_cone = {#h_cone#}; var p = 0.35; // perspective factor /* --- TOP ELLIPSE --- */ board.create('curve', [ function(t){ return R*Math.cos(t); }, function(t){ return H_cyl + p*R*Math.sin(t); }, 0, 2*Math.PI ], {strokeWidth:2}); /* --- CYLINDER WALLS --- */ board.create('segment', [[-R,0],[-R,H_cyl]], {strokeWidth:2}); board.create('segment', [[R,0],[R,H_cyl]], {strokeWidth:2}); /* --- HOPPER SEAM (front arc only) --- */ board.create('curve', [ function(t){ return R*Math.cos(t); }, function(t){ return p*R*Math.sin(t); }, Math.PI, 2*Math.PI ], {strokeWidth:2}); /* --- CONE --- */ var apex = [0,-H_cone]; board.create('segment',[[-R,0],apex],{strokeWidth:2}); board.create('segment',[[R,0],apex],{strokeWidth:2}); /* --- DIMENSION: DIAMETER --- */ board.create('segment', [[-R,H_cyl],[R,H_cyl]], { strokeColor:'blue', dash:2, strokeWidth:2 }); board.create('text', [0,H_cyl+1.5,"{#diam#} m"], { color:'blue', fontSize:14, anchorX:'middle' }); /* --- CYLINDER HEIGHT --- */ board.create('segment', [[R+1.5,0],[R+1.5,H_cyl]], { strokeColor:'red', strokeWidth:2 }); board.create('text',[R+2.5,H_cyl/2,"{#h_cyl#} m"],{ color:'red', fontSize:14 }); /* --- CONE HEIGHT --- */ board.create('segment', [[R+1.5,-H_cone],[R+1.5,0]], { strokeColor:'green', strokeWidth:2 }); board.create('text',[R+2.5,-H_cone/2,"{#h_cone#} m"],{ color:'green', fontSize:14 }); [[/jsxgraph]]

If the density of maize is 750 kg/m³, calculate the total mass of maize the silo can hold in tonnes.

Total Mass = [[input:ans1]] tonnes [[validation:ans1]] [[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

Step 1: Find the Radius
Diameter is {@diam@} m, so \(r = {@r@}\) m.

Step 2: Calculate Volumes

\begin{align} V_{\text{cylinder}} &= \pi r^2 h \\ &= \pi \times {@r@}^2 \times {@h_cyl@} \\ &= {@V_cyl@} \text{ m}^3 \\\\ V_{\text{cone}} &= \frac{1}{3} \pi r^2 h \\ &= \frac{1}{3} \times \pi \times {@r@}^2 \times {@h_cone@} \\ &= {@V_cone@} \text{ m}^3 \\\\ \text{Total Volume} &= {@V_cyl@} + {@V_cone@} = {@total_m3@} \text{ m}^3 \end{align}

Step 3: Convert to Mass (Tonnes)

\begin{align} \text{Mass in kg} &= \text{Volume} \times \text{Density} \\ &= {@total_m3@} \times 750 = {@total_mass_kg@} \text{ kg} \\\\ \text{Mass in Tonnes} &= \frac{@total_mass_kg@}{1000} \\ &= \mathbf{{@ta@} \text{ tonnes}} \end{align}

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
